query: Route panics when .to() or .service() is called after .wrap() middleware

selected_items.title: wrap (route.rs)
selected_items.symbol_body:
pub fn wrap<M, B>(self, mw: M) -> Route
    where
        M: Transform<
                BoxService<ServiceRequest, ServiceResponse, Error>,
                ServiceRequest,
                Response = ServiceResponse<B>,
                Error = Error,
                InitError = (),
            > + 'static,
        B: MessageBody + 'static,
    {
        Route {
            service: boxed::factory(apply(Compat::new(mw), self.service)),
            guards: self.guards,
            wrapped: true,
        }
    }

metadata.note: flows available for only 1 of top 1 items; consider re-indexing or widening the query
